name: Ariana Mitchell
bio: Met during computer science classes at university. We still exchange book recommendations and go hiking during winter breaks.

name: Daniel Kim
bio: Former coworker from a startup internship. Usually catch up over basketball games and tech discussions.

name: Sofia Ramirez
bio: We met during a volunteer trip in Nepal. Sofia loves street photography and sends amazing travel stories.

name: Marcus Bennett
bio: Used to train together at the local gym before he moved to another city for work. Still shares fitness tips regularly.

name: Priya Shah
bio: Met at a UI/UX workshop in Dhaka. We often exchange design feedback and try new coffee shops together.

name: Ethan Walker
bio: Connected through an online gaming community five years ago. We still play co-op games every few weekends.

name: Nadia Hassan
bio: Family friend who helped me prepare for internship interviews. Always gives thoughtful career advice.

name: Leo Martins
bio: Played acoustic guitar together at local university events. Leo now produces indie music and shares demos frequently.

name: Hassan Rahman
bio: Met during first-year programming lab. We built small React projects together and still review each other’s code occasionally.

name: Emily Johnson
bio: High school friend who shares a love for novels and creative writing. We exchange book reviews every week.
